---
title: ""
---
::: {.callout-note}
## Workshop Requirements
{{< include _requirements.qmd >}}
:::

Please install the `samplr` package in R, which you can do by running:
```r
install.packages("samplr")
```

If you have issues installing these, please email Lucas Castillo ([lucas.castillo@warwick.ac.uk](mailto:lucas.castillo@warwick.ac.uk)). 
:::
